urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
latest.summary: President Donald Trump stated that the recent US strikes on Iran were conducted in honor of three American soldiers killed in recent days. The US Central Command reported that these strikes were part of a new wave of attacks targeting military sites and communications networks in Iran.
latest.details: President Donald Trump stated that the recent US strikes on Iran were conducted in honor of three American soldiers killed in recent days. The US Central Command reported that these strikes were part of a new wave of attacks targeting military sites and communications networks in Iran. Iran responded by claiming to have conducted a surprise attack in Syria and targeted US aircraft at Jordan's Aqaba airport. The situation escalated as Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that the Strait of Hormuz would not be safe for oil transit as long as US strikes continued.
latest.full_brief: President Donald Trump stated that the recent US strikes on Iran were conducted in honor of three American soldiers killed in recent days. The US Central Command reported that these strikes were part of a new wave of attacks targeting military sites and communications networks in Iran. Iran responded by claiming to have conducted a surprise attack in Syria and targeted US aircraft at Jordan's Aqaba airport. The situation escalated as Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that the Strait of Hormuz would not be safe for oil transit as long as US strikes continued.

latest.title: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
latest.summary: A 13-year-old boy tragically died when part of a fountain collapsed during World Cup victory celebrations in Salamanca province, Spain. Two other young individuals were injured, with one requiring hospitalization for a possible leg fracture.
latest.details: A 13-year-old boy tragically died when part of a fountain collapsed during World Cup victory celebrations in Salamanca province, Spain. Two other young individuals were injured, with one requiring hospitalization for a possible leg fracture. The incident occurred around 00:30 local time as people celebrated Spain's win inside the Árbol Gordo fountain. Ciudad Rodrigo's town hall expressed sorrow over the tragedy, which marred what was meant to be a joyful occasion.
latest.full_brief: A 13-year-old boy tragically died when part of a fountain collapsed during World Cup victory celebrations in Salamanca province, Spain. Two other young individuals were injured, with one requiring hospitalization for a possible leg fracture. The incident occurred around 00:30 local time as people celebrated Spain's win inside the Árbol Gordo fountain. Ciudad Rodrigo's town hall expressed sorrow over the tragedy, which marred what was meant to be a joyful occasion.

latest.title: Israel criticises Labor’s draft Palestine policy in rare foreign intervention ahead of party…
latest.summary: Israel has publicly criticized the Australian Labor Party's draft Palestine policy ahead of its national conference. The Israeli embassy in Canberra issued a statement claiming that the draft risks placing blame solely on Israel for the Gaza conflict while neglecting Hamas's role.
latest.details: Israel has publicly criticized the Australian Labor Party's draft Palestine policy ahead of its national conference. The Israeli embassy in Canberra issued a statement claiming that the draft risks placing blame solely on Israel for the Gaza conflict while neglecting Hamas's role. This intervention is notable as it is uncommon for a foreign government to engage in the internal political matters of another country. The Labor party's platform is set to be debated, reflecting significant changes in its stance on Israel and Palestine since the last iteration.
latest.full_brief: Israel has publicly criticized the Australian Labor Party's draft Palestine policy ahead of its national conference. The Israeli embassy in Canberra issued a statement claiming that the draft risks placing blame solely on Israel for the Gaza conflict while neglecting Hamas's role. This intervention is notable as it is uncommon for a foreign government to engage in the internal political matters of another country. The Labor party's platform is set to be debated, reflecting significant changes in its stance on Israel and Palestine since the last iteration.

latest.title: From hundreds to thousands: How India's 'cockroach' protest movement has grown
latest.summary: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) in India has seen its protest movement grow from hundreds to thousands of participants. The group, which began as a satirical entity, organized a significant protest demanding reforms to the education system.
latest.details: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) in India has seen its protest movement grow from hundreds to thousands of participants. The group, which began as a satirical entity, organized a significant protest demanding reforms to the education system. This latest demonstration marks the largest turnout for the CJP to date. BBC correspondent Azadeh Moshiri reported from the ground in Delhi, highlighting the movement's evolution.
latest.full_brief: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) in India has seen its protest movement grow from hundreds to thousands of participants. The group, which began as a satirical entity, organized a significant protest demanding reforms to the education system. This latest demonstration marks the largest turnout for the CJP to date. BBC correspondent Azadeh Moshiri reported from the ground in Delhi, highlighting the movement's evolution.

latest.title: Spanish and Argentinian fans react outside World Cup final
latest.summary: Fans of Spain and Argentina expressed contrasting emotions outside the New York New Jersey Stadium after the World Cup final. Spanish supporters celebrated their team's victory, while Argentine fans were left disappointed following the match.
latest.details: Fans of Spain and Argentina expressed contrasting emotions outside the New York New Jersey Stadium after the World Cup final. Spanish supporters celebrated their team's victory, while Argentine fans were left disappointed following the match. Spain's Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal during extra time, leading to a 1-0 win for Spain. This victory marked Spain's second World Cup title, adding to their previous win in 2010.
latest.full_brief: Fans of Spain and Argentina expressed contrasting emotions outside the New York New Jersey Stadium after the World Cup final. Spanish supporters celebrated their team's victory, while Argentine fans were left disappointed following the match. Spain's Ferran Torres scored the decisive goal during extra time, leading to a 1-0 win for Spain. This victory marked Spain's second World Cup title, adding to their previous win in 2010.

latest.title: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
latest.summary: Wang Jibing's poetry collection, Low Flight, has won the Lu Xun Literary Prize, one of China's top literary honors. The collection is inspired by the everyday challenges faced by food delivery riders.
latest.details: Wang Jibing's poetry collection, Low Flight, has won the Lu Xun Literary Prize, one of China's top literary honors. The collection is inspired by the everyday challenges faced by food delivery riders. Wang, who became a delivery rider in 2019, has gained popularity on social media for his literary works. His win highlights the increasing recognition of blue-collar workers in China's literary scene.
latest.full_brief: Wang Jibing's poetry collection, Low Flight, has won the Lu Xun Literary Prize, one of China's top literary honors. The collection is inspired by the everyday challenges faced by food delivery riders. Wang, who became a delivery rider in 2019, has gained popularity on social media for his literary works. His win highlights the increasing recognition of blue-collar workers in China's literary scene.

latest.title: Test that found source of US explosive diarrhoea outbreak was false positive, health officials…
latest.summary: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive.
latest.details: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive. At least 94 people have been hospitalized due to cyclosporiasis infections linked to the outbreak. Taylor Farms is voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce sourced from central Mexico from the US market.
latest.full_brief: The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) reported that a sample from Taylor Farms tested positive for cyclospora. However, the FDA later determined this result to be a false positive. At least 94 people have been hospitalized due to cyclosporiasis infections linked to the outbreak. Taylor Farms is voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce sourced from central Mexico from the US market.

latest.title: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 massacre
latest.summary: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island.
latest.details: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island. Survivors and relatives of the victims attended the unveiling ceremony in Oslo. The names of all 77 victims are engraved on the memorial.
latest.full_brief: Norway has opened a new memorial for the 77 victims of the 2011 terror attack. The memorial features a large artwork depicting a bird native to Utoeya island. Survivors and relatives of the victims attended the unveiling ceremony in Oslo. The names of all 77 victims are engraved on the memorial.

latest.title: AliExpress fined almost $630 million over illegal product sales
latest.summary: AliExpress has been fined €550 million (about $629 million) for violating the EU's Digital Services Act by failing to prevent the sale of illegal and unsafe products. This penalty is the largest imposed under the DSA to date and is more than double the fine given to rival retailer Temu for similar violations.
latest.details: AliExpress has been fined €550 million (about $629 million) for violating the EU's Digital Services Act by failing to prevent the sale of illegal and unsafe products. This penalty is the largest imposed under the DSA to date and is more than double the fine given to rival retailer Temu for similar violations. The European Commission criticized AliExpress for not taking effective measures to reduce the dissemination of illegal products and for allocating insufficient staff to verify product safety. AliExpress has until October 20th, 2026, to remedy the breach or face additional fines.
latest.full_brief: AliExpress has been fined €550 million (about $629 million) for violating the EU's Digital Services Act by failing to prevent the sale of illegal and unsafe products. This penalty is the largest imposed under the DSA to date and is more than double the fine given to rival retailer Temu for similar violations. The European Commission criticized AliExpress for not taking effective measures to reduce the dissemination of illegal products and for allocating insufficient staff to verify product safety. AliExpress has until October 20th, 2026, to remedy the breach or face additional fines.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
